entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns that she doesn’t really care about Palestinian children, she just wants to weaponize their suffering to be hateful towards Israelis & Jews. If she actually CARED about Palestinian children, she’d acknowledge how Palestinian L

entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns about Holocaust Inversion & how intellectually dishonest & hateful it is — to equivocate the war in Gaza that Israel didn’t start which has the lowest civilian to combatant death ratios in modern history — to the systematic,

entry.title: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ
entry.content: Everyone needs to tell @cynthiaenixon & @rosie to stop being mouthpieces for the Islamist Republic of Iran. They are sharing factually untrue, unverified information from Qatari news agencies that are fueling Anti-American hate. Hamas is a TERRORIST organ

entry.title: Together we’re going to help our friend Purple Hair Girl with fun facts about Israel & Antisemitism so she doesn’t destroy western civilization! Today’s lesson: Demoralization & Ideological Subversion! @freepurplehairgirl @billmaher @roseanne @joerogan @
entry.content: Together we’re going to help our friend Purple Hair Girl with fun facts about Israel & Antisemitism so she doesn’t destroy western civilization! Today’s lesson: Demoralization & Ideological Subversion! @freepurplehairgirl @billmaher @roseanne @joerogan @

entry.title: Purple Hair Girl learns that Israel isn‘t an Apartheid state, but is actually a multicultural democracy! Saying things that aren’t true: doesn’t make them true! Together we can help the Purple Hair Girl! @freepurplehairgirl @billmaher @officialroseannebar
entry.content: Purple Hair Girl learns that Israel isn‘t an Apartheid state, but is actually a multicultural democracy! Saying things that aren’t true: doesn’t make them true! Together we can help the Purple Hair Girl! @freepurplehairgirl @billmaher @officialroseannebar

entry.title: Today Purple Hair Girl learns the definition of her favorite hate slur: Zionist! What a fun fact: replacing "Jew“ with "Zionist“ doesn’t make what you’re saying any less Antisemitic! Learning is fun & together we can help the Purple Hair Girl before she s
